text.message: Dude you traded blue a city to start the game just so you could build a road to beat me
Use a knight if you want any chance of winning
I know how to play the game, thanks
if you have a knight blue is the rob btw
I’m so done with red telling me how I should play the game.
okay then rob me. I’m fine with blue winning he did a good job
Dude you think you’re the one that convinced me to rob him, like I need my hand held
You robbed the 5 and then the 6 rolled twice
You handed him a city to have a massive lead, I don’t wanna hear it. You’re not an almighty player
wow first time I dindnt get stolen
Green has win in hand haha
